# CozyMLS

> CozyMLS is a real-estate CRM for agents: manage MLS-style property listings, contacts, deals, activities, and reports in one place.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Dashboard overview of contacts, deals, revenue, and recent activity.
- [Properties](/properties): MLS-style property listings with filtering by status and type.
- [Contacts](/contacts): Lead and contact management with status tracking and tagging.
- [Deals](/deals): Sales pipeline across prospect, qualified, proposal, negotiation, closed-won, and closed-lost stages.
- [Activities](/activities): Tasks, meetings, and calls timeline with priorities and due dates.
- [Reports](/reports): Custom report builder with chart and table templates.

## Optional

- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Account access for agents and administrators.
- [Settings](/settings): Profile, preferences, and security settings.
